{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231443220B91996150FDFEFEBFA2"}"},"total":2022},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7576500426846077758","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"听书听完了，听了好久好久，一共听了137个小时，配音团队特别好，配的超级棒，男主声音配得非常好，女主们还有一些配角配的也都超级超级好。剧情简直是太爽了，男主手段极其残忍又变态太变态了，不过我好喜欢，简直爽到飞起就喜欢看这种不用动脑子的超级爽文，超级无敌搞笑，非常喜欢这种书剧情无脑超级爆笑，超级爽，突然完结了，还真的好舍不得。希望作者以后的作品也能保持这种风格，非常喜欢的一本书，强烈推荐暴爽，超级无敌搞笑，十分变态残忍，强烈推荐，期待作者的下一本书。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1764043533,"group_id":"7265855374572391486","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/FyfCfhAd2aDitDAlNyn5/HuJtXgz0bMi1EoPFhS1Mm","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2348977606633133","user_name":"爱吃杭州老鸭煲的梅霄"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2348977606633133","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7265855374572391486","book_info":{"abstract":"末世+重生+无限空间+狂囤物资+复仇+不圣母+苟
2050年，太阳黑子爆发，全球发生极端高温，动植物大量灭绝，人类死亡百分之五十。
2051年，小行星撞击漂亮国，引起地壳运动，火山大量喷发，火山灰进入平流层，遮蔽阳光，全球进入冰河时代。
2052年，火山灰逐渐落下，冰川融化，全球暴水。
林枫在末世苟活三年，结果却被人活活分食。
重生回末世到来前一个月，林枫带回空间异能，狂囤物资。
缺水？我收了贝加尔湖，你随意。
缺油？我直接掏空一座油田！
缺粮食物资？我偷了漂亮国几十个仓储中心！
住的不安全？我花30亿打造一个钛合金钢铁堡垒！
没有武器？我偷了俄国三个军事基地！
绿茶表：林枫！你是爱我的！只要你让我住进你家！你让我做什么都可以！
富二代：林枫！我出一百亿！你让我给你当狗可以吗！狗吃啥我吃啥！
禽兽邻居：林枫！远亲不如近邻！你不应该那么自私！把物资分我们点吧！
林枫：你们死不死跟我有什么关系！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/58ebb8cea5cd1fd0037daaaec447edb2","author":"六月十九夜","author_id":"","book_id":"7265855374572391486","book_name":"末世：洗劫海外万亿物资我无敌了","book_short_name":"末日享受人生","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281810","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":494,"name":"囤物资","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=494&name=囤物资&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":515,"name":"末日求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=515&name=末日求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":658,"name":"天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=658&name=天灾&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7265855593393439294","read_count":"33443","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1925157"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.9","serial_count":"937","tags":"科幻末世,重生,空间,末世,求生,囤物资,末日求生,天灾","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e85387c921d07a3e30a1aaed6888bd41~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779432202&x-signature=el91cUfpetP6kYc50PKRhwx4wfE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2586518568307187","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"16 太他妈好了，尽管主角在处事上有点旁敲侧击，完成我想要做的事
不过结果是，写的好，这就行了
特别是处女情结，所有的后宫都是处
简直让我嗨的不行"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1705419864,"group_id":"7265855374572391486","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"读书破万卷，下笔如有神","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9RH1FSLuVpuBqmyDE5f7YtqGTViHz0EdP3sAcss3bxZ","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8564e48fbccb47ff8a490107b4ef7b97~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792380&x-signature=3xEou7WX42ffeGL1e7knYbX641s%3D","user_id":"3737947434136551","user_name":"滑稽元帅"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3737947434136551","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7265855374572391486","book_info":{"abstract":"末世+重生+无限空间+狂囤物资+复仇+不圣母+苟
